'''Houche''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]], which surrounded the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]]. Houche was an endpoint of the [[Annaj-Houche Run]].

{{Planet-stub}}
